title: Stage 4 Small Cell Lung Cancer
body:
A little pick me up for the people with lung cancer. I have SCLC , metastasis to brain , making me stage 4. I had 3 brain surgeries and radiation a few times. At first .. my diagnosis was horrible, I went down so quickly! Then I started treatment. 
Everything was ok for the first 6 months , then the cancer came back.. I read that is normal. Well , I was on my 2nd type of chemo and was doing ok and it came back 4 months later.. I got real upset that time because I was not ready to leave this world because I was only 32 years old . Well, I would not accept those disgusting diagnoses and decided to start researching cures for my type cancer.. well found out that most die within 6 months.. so what was not a good idea on the research part.. BUT.. I found JOE TIPPENS PROTOCOL.. I finally had some hope! I bought everything I needed and started immediately without using some of the protocol, I do like 4 out of the supplements.. but the main 1 is the Fenbendazol, I read exactly what it does to the cancer and your body .. found out when you need to take it and with what and how long .. well I’m here to tell you that was 4 years ago and I am still here. You must be consistent with your supplements, taking them on time and daily, no skipping days. If you do this , you will have a better chance at beating this! NEVER GRT STRESSED! Cancer LOVES stress!! Remember that! Good luck people!!
